response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and some embedded work, but the role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and substantial large-scale distributed-systems/cloud-compute platform leadership. The resume shows only brief early-career C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (~6 months) and primarily JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang experience since. No evidence of leading internal cloud compute platforms or formal tech-lead role meeting the bar.
strengths: Long, varied senior engineering track record with craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only one short C/C++ role at National Instruments
No clear large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership at the required scale
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring background
